title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Consultancy Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Consultancy Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Tata Consultancy Services has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Consultancy Services:
Tata Consultancy Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services!
